name: user-rules
description: Personal CC Safety Net rules: no global installs, no irreversible gh/npm actions, no cooldown-policy bypass.
author: project

rules.name: block-npm-global-install
rules.reason: Global npm installs can cause version conflicts. Use npx or a local install.

rules.name: block-npm-global-i
rules.reason: Global npm installs can cause version conflicts. Use npx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-add
rules.reason: Global pnpm installs can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-install
rules.reason: Global pnpm installs can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-subcommand
rules.reason: Global pnpm commands can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-bun-global-add
rules.reason: Global bun installs can cause version conflicts. Use bunx or a local install.

rules.name: block-bun-global-install
rules.reason: Global bun installs can cause version conflicts. Use bunx or a local install.

rules.name: block-gh-pr-merge
rules.reason: Merging pull requests from the terminal is irreversible enough to require an explicit manual decision.

rules.name: block-yarn-global-add
rules.reason: Global yarn installs can cause version conflicts. Use yarn dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-gh-repo-delete
rules.reason: Deleting a repository is irreversible and requires an explicit manual decision.

rules.name: block-npm-publish
rules.reason: Publishing to the npm registry is irreversible and requires an explicit manual decision.

rules.name: block-npm-cooldown-bypass
rules.reason: The min-release-age cooldown protects against supply-chain attacks. Do not override or weaken it; ask a human instead.

rules.name: block-pnpm-cooldown-bypass
rules.reason: The minimumReleaseAge cooldown protects against supply-chain attacks. Do not override or weaken it; ask a human instead.

rules.name: block-yarn-cooldown-bypass
rules.reason: The npmMinimalAgeGate cooldown protects against supply-chain attacks. Do not override or weaken it; ask a human instead.
